hymns.title: All Creatures of Our God and King
verses:
All creatures of our God and King,
Lift up your voice and with us sing,
Alleluia, Alleluia!
Thou burning sun with golden beam,
Thou silver moon with softer gleam,
O praise Him, O praise Him,
Alleluia, Alleluia, Alleluia!

Thou rushing wind that art so strong,
Ye clouds that sail in Heaven along,
O praise Him, Alleluia!
Thou rising moon, thou shining stars,
Ye sounds that spring from worlds afar,
O praise Him, O praise Him,
Alleluia, Alleluia, Alleluia!

hymns.title: O Come, All Ye Faithful
verses:
O come, all ye faithful,
Joyful and triumphant,
O come ye, O come ye to Bethlehem;
Come and behold Him,
Born the King of Angels;
O come, let us adore Him,
O come, let us adore Him,
O come, let us adore Him, Christ the Lord!

Sing, choirs of angels,
Sing in exultation,
Sing with us, ye faithful all around God's throne;
How the heights reecho
With your glad hosannas;
O come, let us adore Him,
O come, let us adore Him,
O come, let us adore Him, Christ the Lord!

hymns.title: Jesus Loves Me
verses:
Jesus loves me, He who died,
Heaven's gate to open wide;
He will wash away my sin,
Let His little child come in.
hymns.chorus:
Yes, Jesus loves me,
Yes, Jesus loves me,
Yes, Jesus loves me,
The Bible tells me so.
